# Sean Taylor

> Games industry veteran, consultant, strategic advisor, and author based in Dundee, Scotland.

## Identity

- Name: Sean Taylor
- Location: Dundee, Scotland, UK
- Website: https://seantaylor.work
- Notes: https://notes.seantaylor.work
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mrseantaylor/

## What I do

I help good people do great things in the games industry and adjacent creative sectors. I provide specialist consultancy and strategic advisory to the games industry, public sector, and higher education in the UK and MENA.

I co-pilot Playhaus (the Playful Media Lab) and run SVLT, my playful product studio.

## Key achievements

- Joined DMA Design in 1996 during production of the original Grand Theft Auto
- Spent 10 years at Denki as Entertainment Product Architect
- Founded and led InGAME (Innovation for Games and Media Enterprise), the UK's national research and innovation centre for video games, backed by £5.3M UK Government funding via AHRC/UKRI. Delivered 177 industry collaborations, upskilled 2,283 professionals, stimulated £11.5M in industry co-investment, and projected £84.7M GVA over 10 years (16x return on public investment)
- Co-authored "Punk Playthings: Provocations for 21st Century Game Makers" (CRC Press, 2017) with Chris Lowthorpe
- 25+ years experience across game production, R&D strategy, innovation labs, and games education

## Domains of expertise

- Video game production and design
- R&D and innovation strategy
- Creative industries policy and public sector advisory
- Games education and skills development
- Playful design and interactive experiences
- Studio and publisher consultancy

## Current projects

- Playhaus: the Playful Media Lab (with Dr Chris Lowthorpe)
- SVLT: playful product studio
- Attention Yield: consultancy framework
- Denki Dojo: experimental project

## Site structure

- / — Landing page (highlights, links)
- /notes — Blog and notes (hosted on Bear Blog at notes.seantaylor.work)
